item.title: This Samsung Galaxy S26 update makes it ultra-easy to share files with an iPhone

item.itunes:author: christinep2424@gmail.com (Christine Persaud)

item.description: You can now easily share files from a Samsung Galaxy S26 to an Apple device using AirDrop.
item.content:encoded: You can now easily share files from a Samsung Galaxy S26 to an Apple device using AirDrop.

item.content:encoded: Xiaomi's two latest phones have blazing-fast hardware, top-notch cameras, heavyweight batteries that can be juiced up in a jiffy, and a lot more.
